explanation: 该研究涉及大气环境中有机过氧化物的反应动力学和机理，特别是氢过氧基甲酸（HPMF）与羟基（OH）和羰基氧化物（CH2OO）的反应。这些反应与大气化学过程密切相关，如次生有机气溶胶（SOA）的形成和大气氧化物的转化，因此与大气环境遥感技术（如空气质量监测和大气成分分析）密切相关。
authors: Sen Yang;Bo Long
title: Atmospheric mechanisms and kinetics of hydroperoxymethyl formate reactions with OH and Criegee intermediates
abstract:
•The quantitative rate constants for the reactions of hydroperoxymethyl formate (HPMF) with CH2OO and OH are collectively determined by post-CCSD(T) corrections from coupled-cluster theory, recrossing effects, and anharmonic effects. •HPMF + OH is dominated by hydrogen abstraction via the –OOH channel over the temperature range of 210–350 K; HPMF + CH2OO favors cycloaddition (210–350 K), influenced by anharmonicity and tunneling. •First quantitative k (298 K) for HPMF + OH (3.50 × 10−12cm3molecule−1s−1) and refined k for HPMF + CH2OO (7.97 × 10−13cm3molecule−1s−1), highlighting OH as a major HPMF sink. •Temperature-dependent removal: CH2OO dominates below ∼230 K (e.g., nighttime/low T); OH prevails above 230 K, impacting HPMF lifetime and SOA modeling. 
 Hydroxyl radicals (OH) and Cabonyl oxide (CH2OO) are key atmospheric oxidants that govern the transformation of organic compounds. Hydroperoxymethyl formate (HPMF), a highly reactive organic peroxide relevant to low-temperature combustion and secondary organic aerosol (SOA) formation, has poorly constrained atmospheric removal pathways. In this work, high-level quantum chemical calculations combined with reaction kinetics theories were employed to elucidate the detailed mechanisms and kinetics of the HPMF + OH and HPMF + CH2OO reactions. The potential energy profiles were characterized at the W3X-L//CCSD(T)-F12b/jun-cc-pVDZ and GMM(Q).FNO//DF-CCSD(T)-F12b/jun-cc-pVDZ levels, achieving near-CCSDT(Q)/CBS accuracy. Rate constants were determined using a dual-level kinetic approach that incorporates anharmonicity, multi-structural torsional anharmonicity, tunneling, and variational effects at the density functional level. The HPMF + OH reaction primarily proceeds through hydrogen abstraction, with the channel involving H-abstraction from the hydroperoxy (–OOH) group prevailing in the 210–350 K temperature regime. For the HPMF + CH2OO system, the cycloaddition pathway exhibits the highest kinetic feasibility over 210–350 K. Within 210–230 K, tunneling enhances the rate constant of –OOH hydrogen abstraction by about one order of magnitude, whereas at 298 K, multi-structural torsional anharmonicity decreases the cycloaddition rate constant by a factor of ∼6.25. This study provides the first comprehensive theoretical investigation of the HPMF + OH reaction and clarifies the dominant pathways in both oxidation systems, offering essential insights into the chemical evolution and atmospheric fate of HPMF.Previous atmospheric chemistry models have generally failed to fully consider the atmospheric reaction pathways between HPMF and OH radicals when simulating HPMF evolution. The absence of this mechanism may lead to biases in the evaluation of HPMF atmospheric lifetime and transformation pathways, thereby impairing the accuracy of predictions regarding SOA. The results of this study provide a critical theoretical basis for improving aerosol nucleation mechanism models and offer significant value for enhancing the simulation reliability of atmospheric chemistry models.

explanation: 该研究关注加拿大北部城市冬季极端寒冷气候对空气质量的影响，涉及污染物浓度、气象条件（如逆温层和湍流强度）对空气污染的影响，这与大气环境遥感技术中的空气质量监测和污染物分析方法密切相关。
authors: Hossein Alizadeh;Vahid Hosseini
title: Contributions of local weather characteristics to elevated urban air pollution in northern cities in Canada
abstract:
•High-resolution CTM is utilized to analyze urban air pollution during extreme cold winters. •Despite almost similar emissions, NO2and PM2.5are about twice as high in winter. •Persistent inversions and stable stratification elevate winter pollution. •Winter shows VOC-limited O3chemistry, while summer is NOx-limited. •Pollutants penetration heights are confined during the severe cold episode due to the weak turbulence intensity. 
 This research aims to investigate the effects of severe cold climates on the air quality of urban areas by developing and using a high-resolution (time and space) integrated modeling framework. Simulations were conducted for January and July 2019 for the City of Edmonton. The modeling system couples the WRF and CMAQ models in a nested configuration with a 1 km resolution. The model outputs were validated against surface observations using established benchmarks, confirming the robustness of the model. The results indicate that while average emission rates do not show a significant seasonal difference, average winter concentrations of NO2 (9.9 ppb) and PM2.5 (10.5μg/m3) are more than double those of summer, whereas O3 average concentrations are marginally higher in summer. The results show that persistent temperature inversions and stratified air flow induce a predominant positive Monin-Obukhov length which severely inhibits vertical mixing and accumulates pollutants such as NO2 and PM2.5 near the surface during the cold season. In contrast, summer conditions display a typical daily pattern of stability, showing an unstable condition driven by low-level jets and high shear wind profiles in the early morning. However, changes in O3 follow incoming solar radiation rather than stability. Analyzing the VOC/NO2 and POA/TOA ratios indicates that the winter conditions correspond to a transitional/VOC-limited regime, while the summer conditions reflect NOx-limited chemistry and enhanced SOA formation. Analysis of the vertical dispersion of pollutants using penetration height (PH) shows that winter’s consistently low turbulence intensity (TI) restricts the upward transport of pollutants to higher altitudes. In contrast, summer’s significantly higher and diurnally varying TI enhances PH.

explanation: 该论文研究了利用无人机和移动监测技术融合算法来量化计划性秸秆焚烧产生的黑碳排放，这与大气环境遥感技术中的空气质量监测、大气成分分析等密切相关。
authors: Jing Fu;Weiwei Chen;Chong Hui;Xue Yang;Lin Liang;Bowen Shi
title: Developing a fusion algorithm based on UAV and mobile monitoring to quantify black carbon emissions from various types of planned straw residue burning
abstract:
•New UAV-mobile fusion method accurately quantifies black-carbon from planned straw burning. •Straw management, not crop type, drives 4 × spread in emission factors (0.23-1.01 g/m2). •Dry, light wind (RH 24–30 %, WS 1–6 m/s) fixes BC release. •Practice-specific EFs sharpen burn-policy and model grids. 
 Black Carbon (BC) emissions from agricultural straw burning significantly impact air quality and climate change. In China, policies are shifting from blanket bans towards scientifically planned burning, creating an urgent demand for accurate, localized emission data. However, large uncertainties persist in current inventories due to a lack of key management-specific emission factors (EFs) and methods to quantify real-world, transient sources. Thus, we developed a novel fusion algorithm integrating unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) vertical profiling with synchronized mobile monitoring to quantify BC emissions across distinct straw residue configurations (i.e., maize shredded, maize stacked, maize flat-laid, maize remains, and rice stubble) during planned burning periods in Northeast China.The results demonstrate that residue management practice has a greater impact on BC EFs than crop type, with values varying up to 4.4-fold between maize remains (0.23 g/m2) and rice stubble (1.01 g/m2). Vertical profiles demonstrate a distinct physical trade-off wherein straw-stacked configurations promote higher plume rise (reaching ∼55m) and atmospheric dilution, whereas straw-shredded residues concentrate emissions near the surface. Concurrently, the observed low humidity (23.5-30.5%) promoted dry fuel conditions that favored smoldering and elevated EFs, while wind speeds (1.3-6.3 m/s) modulated plume dispersion. Notably, the well-ventilated structure of maize remains not only yielded the lowest EF but also facilitated higher plume rise, demonstrating a dual benefit for source reduction and atmospheric dispersion. Our study provides scientific support for refining emission models and implementing evidence-based management within planned straw burning policies to mitigate BC emissions.

explanation: 该研究涉及大气环境中荧光气溶胶粒子的特征和来源分析，使用了激光诱导荧光技术进行实时检测，这与大气环境遥感技术（如空气质量监测、大气成分分析）密切相关。
topic_words: ['fluorescent aerosol particles', 'Laser-induced fluorescence', 'WIBS-4A', 'atmospheric composition', 'air quality monitoring']
authors: Yang Zhou;Wei Hu;Siyao Yue;Wanyun Xu;Rui Jin;Boran Hua;Zihe Li;Libin Wu;Junjun Deng;Jiangchuan Tao;Nan Ma;Hang Su;Pingqing Fu
title: Characteristics and source analysis of fluorescent aerosol particles at a typical rural site in the North China Plain during autumn and winter
abstract:
•Fluorescent aerosol particles (FAPs) exhibited higher abundance and fraction in autumn than in winter. •Moderate relative humidity (60% < RH < 90%) may favor bioaerosol release, whereas high RH (>90%) promoted wet scavenging. •Biological emissions dominated autumn FAPs, contrasting with combustion sources in winter. 
 Bioaerosols constitute a critical component of atmospheric aerosols, exerting profound impacts on climate, ecosystems, and public health. Laser-induced fluorescence (LIF) techniques allow real-time detection of fluorescent aerosol particles (FAPs), which is one of the most commonly used online bioaerosol monitoring approaches, although certain non-biological fluorescent particles interfere. Current studies on the concentration, size distribution, and sources of bioaerosols in specific environments, such as agro-ecosystems, remain limited, hindering accurate assessment of their environmental effects. In this study, a LIF-based Wideband Integrated Bioaerosol Sensor (WIBS-4A) was deployed in a typical agricultural region of the North China Plain (NCP) during autumn and winter. Results showed the number concentration (650 ± 566 L−1) and the fraction in total particles (16 ± 12%) of FAPs in autumn were significantly higher than those in winter (470 ± 850 L−1, 9.6 ± 8.4%), with substantial temporal variability. Autumn FAPs were dominated by the coarser mode (peaking at 1–3 μm), likely associated with pollen and fungal spores, whereas winter FAPs prevailed in the finer mode (peaking at ∼1 μm), suggesting contributions from mixed sources, including combustion-related FAPs and possibly some small biological particles (e.g., bacteria). Diurnally, FAPs peaked in the early morning and late afternoon, probably driven by biological rhythms and planetary boundary layer dynamics. Moderate relative humidity (60%–90%) may favor biological aerosol release and was associated with enhanced FAPs, whereas high RH (>90%) promoted wet scavenging of FAPs. Source apportionment based on positive matrix factorization analysis revealed clear seasonal contrasts in sources. Autumn FAPs were primarily associated with biological emissions, with additional contributions from biomass burning and soil/dust, whereas winter FAPs were dominated by combustion-related sources, accompanied by biological sources and soil/dust. This study elucidates the dynamics and sources of bioaerosols in a typical agro-ecosystem in the NCP, providing foundational data for modeling regional atmospheric biogeochemical cycles and assessing health and climate effects.

explanation: 该论文研究了雅典地区细颗粒物（PM2.5）的季节性和昼夜变化来源，结合了多种在线监测仪器和受体模型分析。研究内容涉及空气质量监测、交通排放、生物质燃烧和二次 aerosol 等与大气环境遥感技术相关的主题，因此与大气环境遥感技术密切相关。
authors: Georgios Grivas;Eleni Liakakou;Panayiotis Kalkavouras;Iasonas Stavroulas;Kalliopi Petrinoli;Despina Paraskevopoulou;Irini Tsiodra;Maria Tsagkaraki;Aikaterini Bougiatioti;Alessandro Bigi;Evangelos Gerasopoulos;Nikolaos Mihalopoulos
title: Seasonal and diurnal variability of fine aerosol sources derived from receptor modeling of multi-instrument online composition measurements in Athens, Greece
abstract:
•Diurnal cycles of PM2.5sources on a seasonal basis in Athens, combining online monitors. •High-resolution data elucidate contrasts between exhaust and non-exhaust traffic sources. •Urban background PM2.5from traffic decreased by 28% during the spring 2020 lockdown. •The variability of toxic shipping emissions at a large port also traced at inland sites. •Natural particles and aged aerosol form a PM2.5background difficult to regulate. 
 To characterize the diurnal variability of fine aerosol sources on a seasonal basis, a monitoring campaign was conducted at the NOA-Thissio urban background site in central Athens. Online measurements were performed during warm (June-September 2019), cold (February-March 2020), and COVID-19 lockdown (March-May 2020) periods. Concentrations of 15 elements in PM2.5 were measured at 3-h resolution with a Horiba PX-375 EDXRF analyzer. Collocated data were obtained for organic aerosol and ions (Q-ACSM), black carbon and its components (AE33 aethalometer), and selected cations (PILS-IC). Metals related to non-exhaust emissions (Cu, Fe, Zn) exhibited bimodal cycles and substantial lockdown reductions (39-44%). Levels of crustal elements (Si, Al, Ti, Mn) were elevated at midday in summer due to enhanced dust erosion and resuspension. Episodic elemental concentrations were observed during Saharan dust outbreaks, wildfires (through emission and pyroconvection), and firework events. The speciated data were combined in PMF receptor modeling, identifying eight PM2.5 factors related to traffic emissions (exhaust and non-exhaust), biomass burning (BB), oil combustion in shipping, natural particles (long-range transported and local), and secondary aerosol (regional and locally processed). Substantial lockdown decreases in traffic sources were observed (−28% combined), but only the evening peak in diurnal cycles was fully suppressed by the traffic ban. For the shipping source, the diel variation of passenger ship emissions appeared to build upon a strong background from commercial shipping. The results corroborate ongoing research in Athens, which indicates that achieving the new PM2.5 standard will require further control of traffic emissions, proactive regulation of residential BB, and reevaluation of the urban impacts of heavy-oil combustion in shipping, considering the declaration of the Mediterranean as an emissions control zone.

explanation: 该论文主要研究东亚夏季季风对西南涡活动、降水和结构的影响，虽然涉及大气环流和降水，但并未明确涉及大气环境遥感技术，如空气质量监测、卫星观测或气溶胶反演等。
authors: Xiaoqian Zhang;Xinyuan Feng;Caiyun Feng
title: Influence of East Asian summer monsoon advance and retreat on southwest vortex activity and precipitation
abstract:
•Beginning time of Meiyu season south of the Yangtze River and EASM ending time are the critical time. •The former (latter) is the time when the genesis of precipitating (dry) SWVs begins to dominate. •There are pronounced changes in the SWV climatology and structures before and after the EASM advance/retreat. •Synergy of EASM, South Asian summer monsoon, and TP summer monsoon are responsible for these. 
 In late spring and early summer, the activities of the southwest vortex (SWV), a high-impact weather system in China, undergo significant changes, probably closely associated with the onset and advance of the East Asian summer monsoon (EASM). However, the knowledge about this is limited. In this study, the influences of the EASM northward advance and southward retreat on SWV climatology, precipitation, and structures and the mechanisms are investigated. Results show that the beginning time of Meiyu season south of the Yangtze River (the 31st pentad on average) and EASM ending time (the 56th pentad) are respectively the critical time when SWV precipitation undergoes conversion. The former (latter) is the time when the precipitating (dry) SWV geneses begin to dominate. Synergy of EASM, South Asian summer monsoon (SASM), and Tibetan Plateau summer monsoon (TPSM) accounts for pronounced changes in SWV climatology, precipitation, and structures. The EASM advance preferentially contributes to the genesis of precipitating, long-lived, and far-moved SWV. The SWV increases in scales, with strengthened cyclonic circulation and ascend motion, no tilting, and weakening low-level baroclinicity. From perspective of dynamic and thermal mechanisms, upper-level divergence strengthened by South Asian high shifting is conducive to low-level convergence and ascend motion development, and low-level warm and humid synoptic background creates thermal instability favoring convective development. From moisture transport perspective, West Pacific Subtropic high shifting northward strengthens warm water vapor transported by low-level southwesterly jet. The moisture transport of Bengal Bay trough increases due to SASM onset. The TPSM enhances and the water vapor pumping effect of TP intensifies. Three monsoons combine to significantly increase moisture transport to the SWV source region.

explanation: 该论文研究利用地面多波长光学数据对气溶胶进行分类，并发展了一种基于吸收和散射系数的层次聚类方法来识别长距离传输的加拿大野火气溶胶。这与大气环境遥感技术密切相关，尤其是空气质量监测和气溶胶成分分析。
topic_words: ['aerosol typing', 'absorption and scattering', 'hierarchical clustering', 'Canadian wildfire aerosol', 'ground-based optical data']
authors: M. Acton-Bond;S. Rimoldi;V. Bernardoni;L. Cadeo;G. Valli;C. Colombi;R. Cosenza;R. Vecchi
title: Near-real time episode identification: Long-range transport of Canadian wildfire aerosol
abstract:
•Ground-based multi-wavelength optical data provided aerosol typing. •Absorption and scattering data over their 95th percentile used to detect episodes. •Aerosol types identified by AAE-SAE hierarchical clustering. •The cluster-based refined methodology was proved to be effective on a case-study. •The long-range transport of Canadian wildfire aerosol was effectively detected. 
 Air quality has significant impacts on human health, the environment and climate, with atmospheric aerosol playing a key role. As such, the development of methodologies for aerosol typing at a highly resolved time frame is of great value to monitoring networks as they can aid in identifying at a fast pace and at a fine time resolution which aerosol sources are present in peak events of particulate matter pollution. In this context, optical data can be exploited for fast aerosol typing purposes as instruments which measure absorption and scattering coefficients operate at a time resolution of up to minute time frames.In this work, we refined a previously developed aerosol typing methodology, namely a hierarchical clustering of Absorption/Scattering Ångström Exponents, to identify which aerosol sources are responsible for peak absorption and scattering episodes. As a case-study for testing the methodology, a dataset collected in Milan (Italy) was used; it comprises one-month multi-wavelength absorption and scattering coefficients detected at ground-level with 15-min resolution.The methodology proved to be effective in characterising the role of local sources in peak events and led to the identification of a long-range transport of Canadian wildfire aerosol which occurred in June 2025 and affected the whole of Europe including Milan.

explanation: 该研究涉及使用机器学习和特征选择改进天气预报的后处理，虽然主要关注天气预报而非直接的大气环境遥感技术，但其方法和应用（如使用气象数据、预测温度、降水和风速）与大气环境监测和分析有间接相关性。
authors: Kazuma Iwase;Tomoyuki Takenawa
title: Improvements to the post-processing of weather forecasts using machine learning and feature selection
abstract:
•ML post-processing models are developed for three variables at 18 sites in Japan. •Surrounding-grid predictors improve accuracy by using spatial context. •Correlation-based feature selection removes redundant surrounding-grid inputs. •LightGBM gives lower RMSE than MSM, MSMG, and tested NN/CNN baselines. •Tweedie weighting improves threshold-based precipitation prediction. 
 This study aims to develop and improve machine learning-based post-processing models for precipitation, temperature, and wind speed predictions using the Mesoscale Model (MSM) dataset provided by the Japan Meteorological Agency (JMA) for 18 locations across Japan, including plains, mountainous regions, and islands. By incorporating meteorological variables from grid points surrounding the target locations as input features and applying feature selection based on correlation analysis, we found that, in our experimental setting, the LightGBM-based models achieved lower RMSE than the specific neural-network baselines tested in this study, including a reproduced CNN baseline, and also generally achieved lower RMSE than both the raw MSM forecasts and the JMA post-processing product, MSM Guidance (MSMG), across many locations and forecast lead times. Because precipitation has a highly skewed distribution with many zero cases, we additionally examined Tweedie-based loss functions and event-weighted training strategies for precipitation forecasting. These improved event-oriented performance relative to the original LightGBM model, especially at higher rainfall thresholds, although the gains were site dependent and overall performance remained slightly below MSMG.

explanation: 该论文研究1999年长江流域夏季降水预测偏差，涉及大气环流、ENSO事件和季节性预报技术，这些都与大气环境遥感技术（如卫星观测、大气成分分析）密切相关。
authors: Haipeng Zhang;Lijuan Chen;Jinqing Zuo;Xuannan Wang;Junhu Zhao
title: The 1999 summer precipitation prediction bias over the Yangtze River Basin: A multi-model ensemble perspective
abstract:
•In the summer of 1999, the YRB was hit by a major flood under a La Niña event. •Both the operational forecasts and current MME hindcasts provided inaccurate prediction. •Two key model biases are responsible for the low forecast skill. 
 During the summer of 1999, the middle and lower reaches of the Yangtze River Basin (YRB) experienced severe flooding under La Niña conditions, in sharp contrast to operational seasonal forecasts that had predicted below normal rainfall. To address this, the present study investigates the physical mechanisms responsible for the low forecast skill using reanalysis data and multi-model ensemble (MME) hindcasts from ten operational seasonal forecasting systems. Observed evidence reveals that the heavy rainfall over the YRB was linked to a strong westerly anomaly extending eastward from the northern Indian Ocean. Blocked by a high pressure system to the north, this flow formed a cyclonic circulation over the YRB, causing excessive precipitation. However, the state of the art operational models failed to predict the severe 1999 YRB floods. The MME systematically underestimated rainfall due to two key model biases. First, the model overestimated the intensity of the La Niña event, generating excessive equatorial central and western Pacific easterlies. Second, the model misrepresented air-sea interaction in the northwestern Pacific. These combined biases displaced a crucial cyclonic circulation anomaly relative to its observed location, shifting the predicted rainfall away from the YRB. While tropical forcing dominated, the MME also failed to capture an extratropical Rossby wave train that contributed to the event. Results indicate that improving ENSO amplitude prediction and the simulation of tropical-extratropical interaction are essential for seasonal forecasting.

explanation: 标题为“编辑委员会”并非直接指向大气环境遥感技术，摘要信息缺失，无法判断具体相关性。
title: Editorial Board
